text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Cleanin' the blackboard is such a hassle! There's aaall that space, but no. They just have to write up at the tippy top!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm runnin' a li'l late for the limited-time sale, but
there's still hope!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've got the route planned. I'll hit the grocery on
the east side, then zip west to the Umamart! They
better still have stock!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The bargin bin's empty already?! But there's still
the Umamart if I hurry!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: They're sold out here too?! My bargaaaains!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After exhausting herself running around, Tamamo
Cross ends up missing out on the sales.
